name: Remix: Remix: ORBI_Institutional_Core_V2.0.1 Preview
description:
Key Documentation Updates:
Orbi TrustBridge (Secure Escrow): Added detailed lifecycles for conditional payments, including locking funds in PaySafe, multi-party release, and AI-assisted dispute resolution via Neural Sentinel AI.
Enterprise Treasury & Multi-Sig: Documented the new multi-signature approval workflow for large corporate withdrawals and the automated treasury auto-sweep logic.
Hard Budget Enforcement: Clarified the mechanics of departmental cost centers that physically block transactions exceeding allocated limits.
API Specification: Updated the INTEGRATION_MANUAL.md and INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md with new endpoints for escrow operations (/v1/escrow/*) and treasury management (/v1/enterprise/treasury/*).
Core Architecture: Refined the BANKING_ENGINE_V2.md and CORE_BANKING_ARCHITECTURE.md to explain the underlying ledger logic for these new institutional capabilities.
